body:
## Purpose 
Snowy land. Closes #630 
Note: I will turn back on the long runs before merging, after incorporating review comments, to save running a lot on clima

ClimaLand with snow (note that the IC is zero snow) from global run:
![water](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/223f0ce0-4d8e-4fa3-99c8-f6ac88c5ebd6)
![bio](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9948e5ac-2f04-480d-b1a9-5e14d2d0132f)
![other](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/24e0c374-a1fa-49df-9bba-c58ed8cdecef)

## To-do
This PR is already so big!
Tutorial?
Tests? 
Assess conservation in future PR, also addressing #847. Branch is kd/assess_conservation

## Content
1. This adds the snow/soil/canopy model, called "LandModel".
2. It adds diagnostics for this model (this has to be done in this PR to see output in run_fluxnet or the global runs, since those use diagnostics)
3. Creates a global run
4. Uses the snowy land model in our fluxnet runs and in the conservation run

- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Snowy land
